Notes 1: For Eclipse Soundscapes data recorded via an AudioMoth this setting should be 1.
Number of bits used to measure the vertical component of an audio signal. This number defines how finely the amplitude of sound is measured.

Description: For an audiomoth recorded file, the comment string contains the date and time of the recording start, the serial number of the AudioMoth device's serial # (not the same as the ES ID #), the gain level, battery voltage, and temperature.
Notes 1: The AudioMoth's serial number is designated at the factory and is not the same as the ES ID # that the Eclipse Soundscapes team assigned to the device

Description: For an audiomoth recorded file, the artist string contains the AudioMoth device's serial #
Notes 1: The AudioMoth's serial number is designated at the factory and is not the same as the ES ID # that the Eclipse Soundscapes team assigned to the device
